creator: vini.ipsmaker@gmail.com
text: Hi, I'd like to use AIO to read files w/o specifying an offset in the member aio_offset. Instead, I'd like for the current file offset to be used. For Linux, io_uring supports using -1 for the offset to indicate that the current file position should be used instead of passing in an explicit offset. I'd like to do the same on FreeBSD. Could a function aio_readpipe() (and aio_writepipe()) or something like that be added?
